claimText: University of Bristol considers the use of AI or translation tools to be cheating if used for more than generating the occasional short phrase within a sentence or checking basic grammar and spelling, unless assessment instructions allow more comprehensive use.
normalizedValue: AI use beyond occasional phrases and grammar checking is considered cheating

citation.citationTitle: Academic integrity | Current students | University of Bristol
